options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --application-name
options.description: Application name (ClickOnce).

options.name: --description
options.description: Description of the signing certificate.

options.name: --description-url
options.description: Description URL of the signing certificate.

options.name: --base-directory
options.description: Base directory for files.  Overrides the current working directory. [default: C:\Users\runneradmin\AppData\Local\Temp\inspectra-help-sign-0.9.1-beta.26127.1-20bb08efe72643609d554fde8d2af030]

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file or directory. If omitted, input files will be overwritten.

options.name: --publisher-name
options.description: Publisher name (ClickOnce).

options.name: --file-list
options.description: Path to file containing paths of files to sign or to exclude from signing.

options.name: --recurse-containers
options.description: Sign container contents.

options.name: --file-digest
options.description: Digest algorithm to hash files with. Allowed values are 'sha256', 'sha384', and 'sha512'. [default: SHA256]

options.name: --timestamp-url
options.description: RFC 3161 timestamp server URL. [default: http://timestamp.acs.microsoft.com/]

options.name: --timestamp-digest
options.description: Digest algorithm for the RFC 3161 timestamp server. Allowed values are sha256, sha384, and sha512. [default: SHA256]

options.name: --max-concurrency
options.description: Maximum concurrency. [default: 4]

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Sets the verbosity level. Allowed values are 'none', 'critical', 'error', 'warning', 'information', 'debug', and 'trace'.

options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --azure-key-vault-url
options.description: URL to an Azure Key Vault.

options.name: --azure-key-vault-certificate
options.description: Name of the certificate in Azure Key Vault.

options.name: --azure-credential-type
options.description: Azure credential type that will be used. This defaults to DefaultAzureCredential.

commands.name: certificate-store
commands.description: Use Windows Certificate Store or a local certificate file.

options.name: --certificate-fingerprint
options.description: SHA fingerprint used to identify a certificate.

options.name: --certificate-file
options.description: PFX, P7B, or CER file containing a certificate and potentially a private key.

options.name: --password
options.description: Password for certificate file.

options.name: --crypto-service-provider
options.description: Cryptographic Service Provider containing the private key container. Requires /k and optionally /km.

options.name: --key-container
options.description: Private key container name.

options.name: --use-machine-key-container
options.description: Use a machine-level private key container.  (The default is user-level.)

options.name: --interactive
options.description: Allow user interactions (such as a dialog box) when a private key is accessed.
